typography.instructions: Use expo-font to load custom fonts. Apply via StyleSheet.

guidelines: Use StyleSheet API. NO Tailwind CSS.
Use bottom-sheet patterns heavily instead of full screen navigation pushes for adding tasks and journaling.
Cards should not have hard solid bright backgrounds. Use #0A0A0A with a 1px border of rgba(255,255,255,0.08).
Avoid traditional top navigation bars. Keep it clean with contextual icons floating at the top or bottom.
Ensure SafeAreaView is used to prevent content from clipping into device notches.

interactions_and_motion.haptics: HEAVY. Use expo-haptics. Fire haptics on task swipe (impactLight on drag, notificationSuccess on complete), leveling up, journaling submit, and tab changes.

patterns: Swipe-to-complete must use PanGestureHandler and shared values. As you drag, the background reveals Acid Green.
XP bar must fill dynamically using shared values.
Use expo-blur for all overlapping elements, bottom sheets, and sticky headers.

buttons.primary: Solid primary color (#00E5FF) background, TRUE BLACK text, fully rounded (pill).
buttons.premium: Solid neon purple (#B026FF) background, TRUE BLACK text.
buttons.glass: Translucent background (rgba(255,255,255,0.05)), expo-blur underneath, 1px white subtle border.

cards.quest_card: Interactive. Includes a pan gesture handler for swipe to complete. Height around 80px.

modals.backdrop: BlurView from expo-blur with intensity 80 and dark tint.

feature_specific_guidelines.auth: Minimalist OLED black. Big Typography. 'Enter the Grid' CTA. No clutter.
feature_specific_guidelines.hub_dashboard: Avatar centered at top. Circular XP progress or thick glowing bar underneath. Streak counter uses fire emoji with pulsing scale animation.
feature_specific_guidelines.daily_quests: List of swipeable cards. Heavy haptics on completion. Swiping right turns card Acid Green. Screen-wide particle effect on completion (mocked via simple floating SVG/Emojis).
feature_specific_guidelines.micro_journaling: TikTok style fast input. Pop-up bottom sheet. Row of oversized emojis for mood selection. Auto-focus text input, character counter max 140 using JetBrains Mono text.
feature_specific_guidelines.leaderboard: Rankings (Guilds). User's rank sticky at bottom. Global list with pull-to-refresh.

monetization.pro_paywall: Premium feel. Neon purple accents, dark geometry background. 'Unlock Neon Cosmetics'.
monetization.qris_screen: Mocked screen showing a fake QR code for Saweria payment.
monetization.rewarded_ad: Modal simulating a video ad for 2x XP boost with a countdown timer.

backgrounds.description: Dark geometric texture for the pro-paywall or dashboard background.

testing_guidelines.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a testID attribute (React Native equivalent to data-testid) to facilitate robust automated testing. Example: testID="login-submit-button" or testID="quest-swipe-card".
